title: PR Review Report (latest)
description: Latest schema for the CC Review Bot agentic PR review report JSON. This file is the 'latest' alias and is updated in-place with each schema version bump. Frozen per-version snapshots live at report.v{N}.schema.json. Report files embed $schema: 'report.v{N}.schema.json' so historical reports always validate against their frozen snapshot. CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION in review-report-builder.mjs is the single source of truth for which version is active.

schemaVersion.description: Report schema version. '2' for reports that include expanded downstream-impact summary fields; older reports reference their frozen versioned schema.

period.description: Human-readable date span, e.g. '2026-06-01 – 2026-06-22' or a single date.

branch.description: Source branch name. Omitted when unavailable.

author.description: PR author username. Omitted when unavailable or 'unknown'.

timeToReviewMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the review run in milliseconds.

accuracyRating.description: Deterministic 0–100 completeness/confidence score computed by computeAccuracyScore().

result.description: approved = ready, changes-requested = not-ready, commented = ready-with-followups or inconclusive.

hats.description: Reviewer hat name(s) used during this review run.

hatDetails.description: Per-hat findings. Populated only for single-hat reviews; absent for fan-out runs.

aicCreditsUsed.description: GitHub Copilot AI credits (AIC) consumed by this review run. Present only when Copilot CLI reports AIC usage in its JSON event stream; absent for Azure, Codex, and Copilot runs that predate AIC telemetry.

model.description: Primary model used for this review run (resolved from 'auto' or explicit override). Omitted when unavailable.

provider.description: LLM provider that executed this review. Omitted when unavailable.

modelsUsed.description: Per-track model usage. Single entry for standard reviews; one entry per hat for fan-out runs.

notes.description: Human-readable summary of notable run signals: calibration, fan-out, downstream impact, human replies ingested, etc.

JiraTicketRef.description: Reference to the Jira ticket associated with the PR. Present only when a ticket key was detected in the PR title, branch, or description.

title.description: Jira issue summary (ticket title). Present when Jira context was successfully fetched during the review.

ModelUsageEntry.description: Model and provider used for one review track.

label.description: Track label, e.g. 'single-review' or the hat name for fan-out runs.

source.description: How this track was invoked: 'single', 'fan-out', etc.

tier.description: Model tier when tier-selection was active.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort passed to the model, e.g. 'high'.

attemptedModels.description: Models attempted in order when fallback chain was triggered. Only present when >1 model was tried.

DownstreamImpactSummary.description: Present only when the downstream-impact detector was triggered by a shared-contract change.

hasBreakingChanges.description: True when any contract has changeType 'removed' or 'type-change'.

riskClasses.description: Downstream risk classes detected from the changed contracts, e.g. shared-package-contract or data-persistence-contract.

affectedAreas.description: Repo areas where downstream references were found.

validationCount.description: Number of bounded validation hints generated for the downstream references.

warningCount.description: Number of warnings emitted while collecting downstream-impact evidence.
